allow: PowerShell($cmds = @\('mysql','mariadb'\); foreach\($c in $cmds\){ $p = \(Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if\($p\){ "$c -> $\($p.Source\)" } else { "$c -> NOT FOUND" } })
PowerShell(& "C:\\Program Files\\MariaDB 11.4\\bin\\mariadb.exe" -u root --execute="SELECT CURRENT_USER\(\); SHOW DATABASES LIKE 'invitation';")
PowerShell(& "C:\\Program Files\\MariaDB 11.4\\bin\\mariadb.exe" -u root -proot -e "USE invitation; SHOW TABLES;" 2>&1)

PowerShell($g = "C:\\Java\\TC-workspace\\genq-v2"; "wrapper files:"; Get-ChildItem $g -Force -Name | Where-Object { $_ -in @\('gradlew','gradlew.bat','gradle','settings.gradle'\) }; "--- gradle/wrapper ---"; if\(Test-Path "$g\\gradle\\wrapper"\){ Get-ChildItem "$g\\gradle\\wrapper" -Name }; "--- java ---"; if\($env:JAVA_HOME\){"JAVA_HOME=$env:JAVA_HOME"}; $j=\(Get-Command java -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if\($j\){ & java -version 2>&1 } else { "java NOT on PATH" })

PowerShell(& "C:\\Program Files\\MariaDB 11.4\\bin\\mariadb.exe" -u root -proot --default-character-set=utf8mb4 -e "USE invitation; SELECT id,name,message,is_deleted FROM guestbook; SELECT id,side,name,attend,headcount,meal,shuttle FROM rsvp; SELECT id,contact,notify_at,is_sent FROM alarm;" 2>&1)
PowerShell(try { Remove-Item "C:\\Users\\comes\\invited\\weddinginvitation" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "빈 폴더 삭제 완료" } catch { "삭제 실패\(VSCode가 점유 중일 수 있음\): $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($n=\(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if\($n\){ "node $\(node -v\)  @ $\($n.Source\)" } else { "node NOT FOUND" }; $np=\(Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if\($np\){ "npm $\(npm -v\)" } else { "npm NOT FOUND" })
